narrative:
Perry Twp township has 731 registered voters, with 49.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 39.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 28.3 percentage points.
